PreToolUse.command: node -e "const input=require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'); const data=JSON.parse(input); const cmd=(data.toolInput?.command||data.toolInput?.input||'').toLowerCase(); const blocked=['--force','rm -rf /','drop database','drop table']; const match=blocked.find(b=>cmd.includes(b)); if(match){const out={decision:'block',reason:'Blocked dangerous command: '+match};process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(out));process.exit(2);}"
PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $data = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = ($data.toolInput.command, $data.toolInput.input -ne $null)[0]; if(-not $cmd){exit 0}; $cmd = $cmd.ToLower(); $blocked = @('--force','rm -rf','drop database','drop table'); foreach($b in $blocked){if($cmd.Contains($b)){Write-Output ('{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked dangerous command: ' + $b + '"}'); exit 2}}"
